params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: ★★ mistral V5-A + L-051 h2_end_stream fix verify. Per L-051 codified pattern (perplexity #762/gamma #768): h2_end_stream=2 (delayed END_STREAM) causes forged-success scenarios to leave H2 stream open indefinitely → SPA waits forever. mistral was at h2_end_stream=2; now 2→1 (immediate END_STREAM). Combined with prior V5-A schema rev (786→992 bytes with 11 missing fields including parentId/prevVersion/nextVersion/references/memories/moderationCategory/createdById/model/agentId/agentsApiAgentId/quotedContent). Same engine run_id 20260508-121642-42969 (no rebuild needed — DB-only fix). Expected: TRPCClientError 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object' may persist if root cause is JSON schema (not stream framing); OR may resolve if h2_end_stream was the actual blocker. Empirical M0 test.

notes: mistral V5-A + h2_end_stream fix — applies L-051 pattern. Should be 3rd service to verify (after perplexity #762 + gamma #768). DB-only fix, no rebuild.
